message:
fix: remove 6 unreachable duplicate Cancelled match arms

Each match block for asupersync::sync::LockError::Cancelled had a
duplicate arm that could never be reached (Rust matches top-to-bottom).
The second arm in each pair mapped to a SubsystemError/RerankFailed/
EmbeddingFailed variant for "polled after completion", but the first
arm already exhaustively matches the Cancelled variant.

Removed the dead arms from:
- frankensearch-lexical/lib.rs (4 occurrences: delete, index, batch_index, commit)
- frankensearch-rerank/lib.rs (1 occurrence)
- frankensearch-embed/fastembed_embedder.rs (1 occurrence)

Eliminates 6 compiler warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
